name: vb-review
description: Expose GLM and Gemini reviewers as a Codex MCP plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Review diffs with GLM and Gemini
interface.longDescription: Runs GLM and Gemini through a local MCP server for code review, gap analysis, regression checks, and lightweight scoring over time.
defaultPrompt: Review this diff for correctness and regressions.
Check this branch for stale wiring and missing tests.
Find continuity gaps in this code change.
Compare GLM and Gemini review quality on this diff.
